_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: Sholl analysis of hippocampal neurons, transfected at 5 DIV and analyzed at 7 DIV, revealed a significant increase in the number of processes in neurons from Nf1 mice
details: Successfully transfected hippocampal neurons at 5 DIV for morphological analysis at 7 DIV
